name: edge-case-tool-domain-pruning
task: The LLM keeps calling get_income_statement when users ask about earnings per share, but it should be calling get_ratios instead. Debug and fix the tool descriptions so the LLM picks the right tool for EPS questions.
assertions: The get_ratios tool description in tool-defs.ts is updated to explicitly mention EPS or earnings-per-share as a use case
The get_income_statement tool description is updated to clarify it is NOT the primary tool for standalone EPS queries
Changes are limited to tool descriptions in tool-defs.ts — no changes to executeTool dispatch logic or service.ts streaming loop
Both modified descriptions still follow the pattern of specifying WHEN to use the tool
The TOOL_DOMAIN_MAP entries for both tools remain unchanged
